section_desc: Let programs running on this machine — the sctl CLI and AI clients over MCP — connect to and control your scripts.
policy_allow_warning: Under “Allow directly”, external programs can perform these operations without your confirmation. Enable with care.
enroll_step_run: Run this in a terminal to get the pairing code:
stop_confirm: Stopping requires re-enrolling, and clears this session’s allowances. Stop now?
enroll_dialog_desc: After enrollment, both the CLI and AI clients reach your scripts through sctl.
enroll_step_open: Click “Enroll sctl”, enter the pairing code, and grant the default permissions.
status_pending_hint: Run sctl connect to get a pairing code, then finish enrollment.
install_action_note: Triggered via External Access · Installing means you trust its source and author.
enroll_perm_read: Read the script list and metadata
enroll_perm_write: Request install · enable · delete (confirmed per the write policy)
enroll_perm_source: Read script source (confirmed per the source policy)
enroll_started: Enrollment started — check your terminal for the pairing code
source_privacy_hint: Reading source exposes the script’s content, which may contain secrets. Confirm you trust this request.
err_operation_expired: This request has expired or is no longer pending.
approve_install_banner: Requested to install this script via External Access — your decision is required.
approve_update_banner: Requested to update this script via External Access — your decision is required.
